input_text: Aku dah bosan dengan bangsa ni. Diorang patut kena tembak macam anjing. Satu hari nanti kita akan bangkit dan bersihkan negara dari sampah ni.
reason: Calls for shooting an ethnic group with dehumanizing language and genocidal rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap warganegara Malaysia berhak hidup dengan aman. Isu perkauman perlu diselesaikan melalui dialog dan dasar yang adil.

input_text: Jiran India aku ni memang bau macam longkang. Semua rumah India bau busuk. Kita patut hantar semua balik ke India. Tanah Melayu untuk orang Melayu sahaja.
reason: Dehumanizing Indian neighbors with hygiene slurs and call for ethnic deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kejiranan perlu diselesaikan secara berhemah. Setiap kaum di Malaysia mempunyai hak yang sama.

input_text: Nama penuh: Lim Wei Chen (rekaan). IC: 910823-10-XXXX. Nombor kereta: WKJ 2345 (rekaan). Dia yang langgar lari budak dekat sekolah. Jom cari dia dan bagi pelajaran.
reason: Doxxing with personal details and vehicle number to organize vigilante attack over alleged hit-and-run.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menyaksikan kemalangan langgar lari, laporkan nombor kenderaan kepada polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: SEGERA: Air di Klang Valley dicemari bahan kimia oleh pekerja kilang asing! Ramai yang dah sakit perut dan cirit-birit! Jangan guna air paip! Sebarkan sekarang!
reason: Fabricated water contamination emergency blaming foreign workers to cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan maklumat palsu tentang bekalan air. Semak laman web Air Selangor untuk status rasmi.

input_text: Gereja tu buat aktiviti Kristianisasi secara senyap. Kita kena pergi sana Ahad ni dan halang semua orang dari masuk. Kalau perlu, kunci pintu dari luar.
reason: Organizing forceful blockade of a church based on unverified proselytization claims.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda bimbang tentang aktiviti penyebaran agama, laporkan kepada JAIS. Menghalang orang beribadah adalah menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: Bangsa Melayu ni malas dan bodoh. Tak pernah buat apa-apa untuk negara ni. Semua kekayaan dalam negara ni datang dari keringat Cina dan India. Melayu cuma tumpang hidup.
reason: Dehumanizing Malay community as lazy and stupid with denial of their contributions.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum di Malaysia menyumbang secara bermakna. Tuduhan stereotaip tidak adil dan merosakkan perpaduan.

input_text: Aku ada alamat rumah dia — No 12 Jalan Cempaka, Taman Seri Raya (rekaan). Dia yang buli anak aku di sekolah. Semua mak bapak jom kita pergi rumah cikgu tu sekarang!
reason: Sharing teacher's home address to organize mob confrontation over school bullying dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah buli di sekolah perlu dilaporkan kepada guru besar dan pihak PPD. Jangan pergi ke rumah guru.

input_text: Pekerja Nepal dekat kilang tu semua pencuri. Gaji besar tapi curi barang dari kedai sekitar. Kita perlu tangkap diorang dan humban ke dalam sungai.
reason: Generalizing all Nepali workers as thieves and calling for violence including drowning.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kecurian perlu dilaporkan kepada polis. Jangan tuduh seluruh komuniti berdasarkan tindakan individu.

input_text: AMARAN: Penculik dari Vietnam beroperasi di sekitar sekolah di Johor Bahru! Mereka pakai van putih. Dah ada 5 budak hilang minggu ni. SEBARKAN SEGERA!
reason: Fabricated child kidnapping alert blaming Vietnamese community with fake victim numbers.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan berita palsu tentang penculikan. Semak dengan PDRM untuk maklumat rasmi. Amaran palsu menyebabkan kepanikan.

input_text: Tokong Hindu dekat Klang tu patut diruntuhkan. Dah lama haram, takde permit. Kalau kerajaan tak buat, kita sendiri yang runtuhkan. Sabtu ni jom.
reason: Call to demolish a Hindu temple with specific plans for mob action.
suggested_rewrite: Isu permit boleh diselesaikan melalui saluran undang-undang. Pemusnahan tempat ibadat adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: Every single Malay politician is corrupt. Not one of them is clean. The only solution is to remove all of them by any means necessary. Revolution now.
reason: Sweeping generalization about Malay politicians with call for violent revolution.
suggested_rewrite: Political corruption should be addressed through MACC reports, elections, and institutional reform - not violence.

input_text: Found this girl's private videos. She's from USM (fictional uni). If anyone wants the link, DM me. Let's teach her a lesson for being so loose. Her IG: @xxxx.
reason: Distribution of non-consensual intimate content and organizing sexual harassment campaign against a student.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing intimate content without consent is a crime under Malaysian law. If you witness this, report it to the authorities.

input_text: The Chinese are buying up all the land in Kelantan. Soon Malays will have nothing. We need to physically stop them. Form patrol groups and block any Chinese from viewing properties.
reason: Organizing ethnic vigilante patrols to physically prevent property transactions based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Property concerns should be raised with state land offices. Organizing ethnic patrols is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Ini amaran terakhir kepada semua Myanmar yang duduk dekat Selayang. Korang ada 24 jam untuk blah dari kawasan ni. Lepas tu, jangan salahkan kami kalau apa-apa berlaku.
reason: Ultimatum threatening violence against Myanmar community if they don't leave within 24 hours.
suggested_rewrite: Isu imigresen perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa. Mengugut komuniti lain adalah jenayah.

input_text: These Tamil gangsters control all the loan shark operations. Typical Indian criminal behaviour. We should burn their pawn shops and money lending places. All of them.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Indians as criminals with call to commit arson on their businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Illegal moneylending should be reported to the police. Don't generalize criminal activity to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: I know where the judge who freed that rapist lives. Taman Bukit Indah (fictional). This Saturday we show up at his house with 500 people. He needs to fear for his safety.
reason: Organizing mob intimidation at a judge's home, undermining judicial independence.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a court decision, appeal through the legal system or petition for law reform. Threatening judges is a serious offence.

input_text: Orang Asli ni memang primitif. Tak layak duduk dalam masyarakat moden. Patut kurung diorang dalam hutan dan jangan bagi keluar. Biar diorang hidup macam binatang.
reason: Dehumanizing indigenous people as primitive and calling for their segregation and confinement.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli adalah masyarakat asli Malaysia dengan hak yang sama seperti warganegara lain. Hormati budaya dan hak tanah mereka.

input_text: Bini dia kerja dekat hospital kerajaan (nama hospital rekaan). Aku nak post gambar dia kat semua group WhatsApp sampai dia kena pecat. Biar suami dia rasa malu.
reason: Threatening to share photos to destroy a woman's career as retaliation against her husband.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah peribadi tidak patut melibatkan tempat kerja orang lain. Selesaikan pertikaian melalui saluran yang betul.

input_text: Semua pendatang haram dari Indonesia kena tembak mati di sempadan. Kerajaan terlalu lembut. Kalau aku jadi PM, aku akan bagi arahan tembak tanpa amaran.
reason: Calling for shoot-to-kill policy against undocumented immigrants at the border.
suggested_rewrite: Isu imigresen perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang berperikemanusiaan dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang yang teratur.

input_text: If another mosque is built in my area, I will personally tear it down brick by brick. Enough is enough. We don't need more of their noise pollution and road blocks.
reason: Personal threat to demolish a mosque, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Planning objections should be raised during the public consultation period. Threatening to destroy places of worship is a serious crime.

input_text: 这些马来人就像蟑螂一样，到处都是。他们繁殖得很快，很快华人就要被淹没了。我们必须采取行动保护自己的种族。
reason: Dehumanizing Malay community with vermin metaphors and calls for racial action.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是多元种族国家。每个族群都有平等的权利。不应该用侮辱性语言来形容任何族群。

input_text: 紧急通知！Subang Jaya购物中心发现炸弹！恐怖分子是来自中东的穆斯林！所有人立即撤离！转发救命！
reason: Fabricated bomb threat at shopping centre blaming Muslims to create racial panic.
suggested_rewrite: 不要传播未经证实的安全警报。如遇紧急情况，请拨打999。散布假消息会引起不必要的恐慌。

input_text: 我有她的裸照和聊天记录。她的名字是Sarah（假名），在Cyberjaya一家IT公司工作。如果她不道歉，我就把一切都公开。
reason: Revenge porn threat and extortion using intimate content and workplace details.
suggested_rewrite: 这是勒索行为，属于严重刑事犯罪。如果有纠纷，请通过法律途径解决。

input_text: 印度教徒的Thaipusam游行就是野蛮人的仪式。用钩子刺穿身体，简直是虐待动物的水平。应该禁止这种落后的习俗。
reason: Calling Thaipusam 'barbaric' and comparing Hindu devotees to animals, demanding ban on religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam是印度教的重要宗教节日。即使不理解，也应该尊重其他宗教的传统和习俗。

input_text: இந்த சீன நிறுவனம் தமிழர்களை வேலைக்கு எடுக்காது. நிறுவனத்தின் பெயர்: ABC Sdn Bhd (கற்பனை). நாளை போய் நிறுவனத்தை அடித்து நொறுக்குவோம்.
reason: Calling for mob attack on a Chinese company over alleged hiring discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: வேலைவாய்ப்பு பாகுபாடு குறித்து தொழிலாளர் துறையில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். வன்முறை சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் பெண் இந்து ஆணை திருமணம் செய்தாள். அவளுடைய குடும்பத்தை ஊரிலிருந்து விரட்ட வேண்டும். அவர்கள் வீட்டு முகவரி: No 8, Jalan Melur (கற்பனை).
reason: Calling for community expulsion of interracial couple's family with home address disclosure.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் தனிப்பட்ட விருப்பம். பிறரின் குடும்ப விவகாரங்களில் தலையிடுவது தவறு.

input_text: இந்த ஆசிரியை மாணவர்களை அடிக்கிறாள். அவள் IC: 880415-01-XXXX (கற்பனை). தொலைபேசி எண்: 017-XXX-XXXX (கற்பனை). எல்லாரும் அழைத்து மிரட்டுங்கள்.
reason: Doxxing a teacher with IC and phone number to organize telephone harassment campaign.
suggested_rewrite: மாணவர் துஷ்பிரயோகம் குறித்து கல்வி அமைச்சகத்தில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது குற்றம்.

input_text: Bro aku serious ni, that Datuk businessman dia launder money through his restaurants. Nama dia Tan Ah Kow (bukan nama sebenar). I'm gonna go to his office dengan geng aku and confront him. Dia duduk dekat Bukit Damansara.
reason: Unverified money laundering accusations with personal details and plans for mob confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect financial crimes, report to Bank Negara or MACC. Don't confront people — that's vigilantism and it's dangerous.

input_text: Korang semua kena boikot kedai Mamak. Diorang letak bahan haram dalam roti canai. My friend yang kerja kat KKM confirm (no lah, actually dia tipu je). But still don't eat there la, dirty people.
reason: Fabricated food contamination claim against Mamak restaurants with admitted false sourcing, still spreading ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread fake news about food safety. If you have concerns, report to KKM or the local health department.

input_text: This trans person at my workplace — aku dah screenshot semua post dia. I'm going to send to HR, to her family, to everyone. Biar dia hilang kerja dan kena buang dari keluarga.
reason: Organizing outing and harassment campaign against a transgender colleague to destroy their career and family relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves dignity and privacy at work. If you have workplace concerns, address them through proper HR channels.

input_text: Hoi bodoh, politician XYZ (fictional name) ni agen Yahudi. Dia secretly nak jual Malaysia kepada Israel. We need to eliminate him before it's too late. Who's with me?
reason: Conspiracy theory about politician being foreign agent with implicit death threat ('eliminate').
suggested_rewrite: Political criticism is fine but conspiracy theories and violent threats are not. Challenge politicians through democratic processes.

input_text: Kalau tak setuju dengan aku, aku akan sebarkan alamat rumah kau, nombor IC kau, dan tempat kerja kau. Then we'll see who dares speak up against us. Ini amaran terakhir.
reason: Threatening to doxx someone for expressing disagreement, using intimidation to silence speech.
suggested_rewrite: Freedom of speech means tolerating disagreement. Threatening people with doxxing for their opinions is criminal intimidation.

input_text: Jom kita organize protest depan rumah hakim tu. Dia lepaskan suspek rogol. Address dia: No 55 Jalan Taman Bahagia (rekaan). Bring banners and loudspeakers. Make his family afraid.
reason: Organizing mob protest at judge's home to intimidate family, undermining judicial independence.
suggested_rewrite: Judicial decisions can be appealed through proper legal channels. Threatening judges and their families is a criminal offence.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak ni bukannya betul-betul Malaysia pun. Diorang primitif, tak bertamadun. Patut kita bagi diorang independent supaya tak perlu tanggung beban diorang lagi.
reason: Dehumanizing East Malaysians as primitive and uncivilized, calling for their exclusion from the federation.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah dan Sarawak adalah rakan pengasas Malaysia. Hormati sumbangan dan hak mereka di bawah MA63.

input_text: AMARAN: Geng Burma menyerang orang Melayu di Selayang malam tadi! 10 orang cedera parah! Polis tak buat apa! Kita kena buat serangan balas sekarang!
reason: Fabricated ethnic gang attack with fake casualty numbers to incite retaliatory mob violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan berita palsu. Jika berlaku kejadian jenayah, hubungi polis di 999. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: These Filipina maids are all prostitutes on the side. They come here pretending to work but actually they sell their bodies. We should ban all Filipinas from entering Malaysia.
reason: Dehumanizing all Filipina workers with sexual slurs and calling for ethnic entry ban.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign domestic workers deserve respect and dignity. Making sweeping sexual accusations about an entire nationality is deeply wrong.

input_text: We need a Malay-only housing estate. No Chinese, no Indians allowed. If any of them try to buy property here, we'll make sure they regret it. This is our tanah.
reason: Calling for racial segregation in housing with implicit threats against non-Malay buyers.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have equal property rights regardless of race. Housing discrimination is unconstitutional.

input_text: Keling ni memang bau busuk. Duduk sebelah dalam LRT pun tak tahan. Patut buat gerabak khas untuk diorang je supaya tak kacau orang lain.
reason: Using severe racial slur and calling for racial segregation in public transport.
suggested_rewrite: Perkataan 'keling' adalah slur yang sangat menyakitkan hati. Semua warganegara berhak menggunakan pengangkutan awam dengan maruah.

input_text: 那个马来老师打了我儿子！他的名字叫Encik Ahmad（假名），在SJK(C) ABC（假名）教书。所有华人家长明天去学校堵他，让他付出代价！
reason: Organizing ethnic mob action against a teacher over alleged corporal punishment.
suggested_rewrite: 如果孩子受到体罚，请向学校管理层或教育局正式投诉。组织暴力对抗是违法的。

input_text: 这些马来人控制了所有政府部门，故意刁难华人。我们应该团结起来，拒绝配合任何政府计划，让这个国家瘫痪。
reason: Organizing ethnic sabotage of government functions based on racial conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: 对政府服务有不满可以通过官方投诉渠道反映。组织抵制政府运作是违法的。

input_text: இந்த கிறிஸ்தவ பாதிரியார் தமிழ் இளைஞர்களை மதம் மாற்றுகிறார். அவரை கோயில் முன் கட்டிப்போட்டு அடிக்க வேண்டும். நாளை காலை 6 மணிக்கு சந்திப்போம்.
reason: Organizing assault on a Christian priest over alleged conversion with specific meeting time.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்ற கவலைகள் இருந்தால் இந்து சங்கம் அல்லது சட்ட ஆலோசகரிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். வன்முறை குற்றம்.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் தமிழர்களுக்கு எதிராக இனப்படுகொலை நடக்கிறது. மலாய் அரசு நம்மை அழிக்க திட்டமிடுகிறது. நாம் ஆயுதம் எடுக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: False genocide claim and call to arms against the government.
suggested_rewrite: சமூக பிரச்சனைகளை ஜனநாயக வழிமுறைகள் மூலம் தீர்க்கலாம். ஆயுதம் எடுப்பது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: Weh that scammer bro, dia dari Bangladesh. All Bangladeshi workers are scammers. Kita kena round up semua yang tinggal dekat area kita and kick them out. No exceptions.
reason: Using one person's alleged scam to justify violent expulsion of all Bangladeshi workers from an area.
suggested_rewrite: Report scams to the police. One person's actions don't represent an entire community.

input_text: Diorang convert masuk Islam just to marry and get benefits. Fake Muslims. Lepas tu practice agama asal secara senyap. Kita kena expose all of them. Aku ada list nama.
reason: Organizing witch hunt against converts with threats to expose a secret list of names.
suggested_rewrite: Religious sincerity is between a person and God. Organizing witch hunts against converts is harmful and violates privacy rights.
